Adopter.title: Adopter
Adopter.description: Ask the user who is adopting the animal. This should be an existing adopter record or someone who can be matched to one.

Adoption.title: Adoption
Adoption.description: Ask for details about the adoption, such as date. These will be used to create the adoption record.

Animal.title: Animal
Animal.description: Ask which animal is being adopted. This should be a known animal in the system.
